title: Buckwheat Pancakes
description: A delicious breakfast recipe using buckwheat flour and fresh ingredients. Perfect for a weekend morning.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the buckwheat flour, eggs, buttermilk, melted butter, molasses, and honey.
The batter should still be slightly lumpy.
Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Drop the batter by 1/4 cupfuls onto the skillet or griddle.
Cook the pancakes for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface and the edges start to dry.
Flip the pancakes and cook for another 1-2 minutes, until golden brown.
Serve the pancakes warm with your favorite toppings, such as fresh fruit or syrup.
